title: ED blood test result documentation

investigations.text: Supports a traceable record of review, action, responsibility, referral and handover for pathology and radiology results.
investigations.rationale: The exact RCEM results section supports documenting why a result is being reviewed, its source or date when available, the specific test and a traceable clinician review; it does not interpret the result.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports a traceable record of review, action, responsibility, referral and handover for pathology and radiology results.

source.title: Management of Investigation Results in the Emergency Department

exact_section.heading: Summary and pathology/radiology recommendations — traceable review and responsibility

investigations.text: Supports documenting the specific test, reviewed result or report, communication and clinician-determined follow-up action.
investigations.rationale: The exact review and action section supports recording a clinician-entered plan, specialist discussion and handover or follow-up only when actually completed.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting the specific test, reviewed result or report, communication and clinician-determined follow-up action.

source.title: Management of Investigation Results in the Emergency Department

exact_section.heading: Operational guidance — result review, patient communication, record and follow-up action

source_limitations: Actual test identity and value, clinical interpretation, urgency, diagnosis, contact attempts, treatment, referral and follow-up timing remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
